# Versioning Workflow
name: Versioning

on:
  push:
    paths:
      - docs/VERSION.md

jobs:
  bump:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Read VERSION.md
        id: version
        run: |
          VERSION=$(cat docs/VERSION.md | grep 'VERSION:' | cut -d ' ' -f2)
          echo "::set-output name=version::$VERSION"
          echo "Bumping version to $VERSION"
      # Add steps to auto-increment version based on your logic

# Tagging Workflow
name: Tagging

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  tag:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Create Tag
        run: |
          git tag v$(cat docs/VERSION.md | grep 'VERSION:' | cut -d ' ' -f2)
          git push origin --tags

# Docker Build Workflow
name: Docker Build

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Build Docker Image
        run: |
          docker build -t myapp:${{ github.sha }} .

# Docker Push Workflow
name: Docker Push

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  push:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Push Docker Image
        run: |
          docker push myapp:${{ github.sha }}
